name: Selective Laser Sintering (SLS) 3D Printing
description: Additive manufacturing using laser to sinter powdered material layer by layer

name: Fused Deposition Modeling (FDM) 3D Printing
description: Additive manufacturing by extruding thermoplastic filament (Stratasys)

name: EUV Lithography
description: Extreme ultraviolet lithography for sub-7nm semiconductor patterning

name: CMOS Image Sensor
description: Active-pixel CMOS image sensors replacing CCD technology

name: Stereolithography (SLA) 3D Printing
description: UV laser curing of photopolymer resin layer by layer, the original 3D printing technology (Chuck Hull/3D Systems)

name: Direct Metal Laser Sintering (DMLS)
description: Laser sintering of metal powders for direct manufacturing of metal parts (EOS/DTM)

name: Autonomous Vehicle LIDAR
description: 360-degree rotating LIDAR sensor for autonomous vehicle perception (Velodyne/David Hall)
